summary: Lewis Hamilton's arrival injects fresh momentum into Ferrari's championship assault as the Scuderia seeks to capitalize on their momentum-shifting Spanish victory. McLaren's consistency threats and the midfield's tactical fuel strategies could disrupt Ferrari's preferred race tempo at a high-speed circuit that demands precision pit work. A strong result here tightens Ferrari's grip on the constructors' title battle and positions Hamilton to challenge for individual points against the resurgent Red Bull threat.
